description: Brazilian woman late 20s, dark brown wavy shoulder-length hair, natural subtle makeup, confident analytical expression. Wearing PLAIN BLACK crew neck t-shirt (no logo, no text, no graphics - pure black fabric).
style_base: Editorial magazine photography, shot on Leica Q2 50mm, shallow depth of field, 8K resolution, cinematic color grading, high contrast, professional

items.prompt: Editorial portrait of Brazilian woman late 20s, dark brown wavy shoulder-length hair, natural makeup, confident subtle smile. Wearing a completely plain black crew neck t-shirt (no print, no logo). Minimalist modern home office background softly blurred, MacBook and green plants visible. Soft natural window light from left. Shot on Leica 50mm, shallow DOF, 8K editorial magazine quality.

Shot on Canon R5 85mm, shallow DOF, 8K magazine cover quality, cinematic lighting.
